text: <s>[INST] I can't log into my account. It says my password is wrong but I'm sure it's correct. [/INST] I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble logging in. Let me help you with that. First, please try resetting your password by clicking the "Forgot Password" link on the login page. You'll receive a reset link at your registered email address. If you don't receive the email within 5 minutes, please check your spam folder. If the issue persists, I can manually reset your account — just confirm your registered email address.</s>

<s>[INST] No puedo iniciar sesión en mi cuenta. Dice que mi contraseña es incorrecta pero estoy seguro de que es correcta. [/INST] Lamento que tengas problemas para iniciar sesión. Permíteme ayudarte con eso. Primero, intenta restablecer tu contraseña haciendo clic en el enlace "Olvidé mi contraseña" en la página de inicio de sesión. Recibirás un enlace de restablecimiento en tu dirección de correo registrada. Si no recibes el correo en 5 minutos, revisa tu carpeta de spam. Si el problema persiste, puedo restablecer tu cuenta manualmente — solo confirma tu dirección de correo registrada.</s>

<s>[INST] Je voudrais annuler mon abonnement. Comment faire? [/INST] Je comprends que vous souhaitez annuler votre abonnement. Voici les étapes à suivre: 1) Connectez-vous à votre compte, 2) Allez dans "Paramètres" puis "Abonnement", 3) Cliquez sur "Annuler l'abonnement". Veuillez noter que l'annulation prend effet à la fin de votre période de facturation en cours. Vous conserverez l'accès jusqu'à cette date. Souhaitez-vous que je procède à l'annulation pour vous?</s>

<s>[INST] How do I get a refund for my recent purchase? [/INST] I'd be happy to help you with a refund. Our refund policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase. To process your refund: 1) Go to "My Orders" in your account, 2) Select the order you want to return, 3) Click "Request Refund" and select the reason. Refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days and will be credited to your original payment method. Could you share your order number so I can look into this for you?</s>

<s>[INST] Mein Paket ist seit 2 Wochen nicht angekommen. Was kann ich tun? [/INST] Es tut mir leid, dass Ihr Paket noch nicht angekommen ist. Lassen Sie mich das für Sie überprüfen. Bitte teilen Sie mir Ihre Bestellnummer mit, damit ich den Sendungsstatus verfolgen kann. In der Zwischenzeit können Sie den Status auch selbst überprüfen unter "Meine Bestellungen" > "Sendungsverfolgung". Wenn das Paket als zugestellt markiert ist aber nicht angekommen ist, können wir eine Untersuchung beim Versanddienstleister einleiten oder Ihnen eine Ersatzlieferung senden.</s>

<s>[INST] Sitaki tena huduma yenu. Nataka kufuta akaunti yangu kabisa. [/INST] Naelewa kuwa unataka kufuta akaunti yako. Kabla ya kufanya hivyo, ningependa kukujulisha kwamba kufuta akaunti kutaondoa data yako yote ikiwa ni pamoja na historia ya manunuzi na pointi za uaminifu. Ikiwa bado unataka kuendelea, tafadhali thibitisha kwa kujibu na "THIBITISHA KUFUTA." Vinginevyo, tunaweza kusimamisha akaunti yako kwa muda badala ya kuifuta kabisa. Je, ungependa chaguo gani?</s>

<s>[INST] My order arrived damaged. The screen is cracked. [/INST] I'm very sorry to hear that your order arrived damaged. We take packaging quality seriously and I apologize for this experience. Here's what we can do: 1) Please take photos of the damaged item and packaging, 2) Upload them through our "Damaged Item" form in your account, or reply with the images here. Once we verify the damage, we'll offer you either a full replacement shipped within 24 hours or a complete refund. You won't need to return the damaged item. Which option would you prefer?</s>
<s>[INST] 我想更改我的送货地址。订单已经下了但还没发货。 [/INST] 好的，我来帮您更改送货地址。由于您的订单尚未发货，我们可以更新送货地址。请提供以下信息：1) 您的订单号，2) 新的送货地址（包括邮编）。请注意，更改地址可能会影响预计送达时间。如果订单已经进入打包流程，我们可能无法更改，但我会尽力为您处理。</s>

<s>[INST] I was charged twice for the same order. Can you fix this? [/INST] I sincerely apologize for the double charge. This shouldn't have happened and I'll resolve it right away. Let me look into your account. Could you please provide your order number or the email address associated with your account? In the meantime, I want to assure you that the duplicate charge will be fully refunded. Refunds typically appear on your statement within 3-5 business days, depending on your bank. I'll also add a 10% discount code to your account for the inconvenience.</s>

<s>[INST] هل يمكنني تغيير خطة اشتراكي من الشهرية إلى السنوية؟ [/INST] بالطبع! يمكنك تغيير خطة اشتراكك من الشهرية إلى السنوية في أي وقت. الخطة السنوية توفر لك خصم 20% مقارنة بالدفع الشهري. لتغيير خطتك: 1) سجل الدخول إلى حسابك، 2) اذهب إلى "الإعدادات" ثم "الاشتراك"، 3) اختر "الخطة السنوية" واضغط "تحديث". سيتم احتساب الفرق بشكل تناسبي من رصيدك الحالي. هل تريد مني مساعدتك في إتمام التغيير؟</s>

<s>[INST] The promo code I received isn't working. It says invalid. [/INST] I apologize for the trouble with your promo code. Let me help you get that sorted out. There are a few common reasons a code might not work: 1) It may have expired — could you tell me where you received the code? 2) There might be a minimum purchase requirement, 3) It may be for specific products only. Please share the promo code and I'll check its status in our system. If it's a valid unexpired code, I'll make sure it's applied to your order. If it has expired, I may be able to offer you an alternative discount.</s>

<s>[INST] Ich möchte mein Abonnement von Basic auf Premium upgraden. [/INST] Gerne helfe ich Ihnen beim Upgrade auf Premium! Das Premium-Abonnement bietet Ihnen zusätzlich: unbegrenzten Speicherplatz, Prioritäts-Support, erweiterte Analysefunktionen und API-Zugang. Der Preis beträgt 29,99€/Monat statt 9,99€/Monat. Um das Upgrade durchzuführen: 1) Gehen Sie zu "Einstellungen" > "Abonnement", 2) Klicken Sie auf "Plan ändern", 3) Wählen Sie "Premium" aus. Der anteilige Betrag für den Rest des aktuellen Abrechnungszeitraums wird sofort berechnet. Soll ich das Upgrade für Sie vornehmen?</s>

<s>[INST] I need to update my billing information. My credit card expired. [/INST] No problem! You can update your billing information easily. Here's how: 1) Log into your account, 2) Go to "Settings" > "Billing & Payments", 3) Click "Update Payment Method", 4) Enter your new card details and save. Your next billing cycle will automatically charge the new card. If a payment was recently declined due to the expired card, it will be retried within 24 hours after you update your information. Would you like me to walk you through the process?</s>

<s>[INST] Comment puis-je contacter le support technique? Mon application plante constamment. [/INST] Je suis désolé que l'application plante. Avant de vous transférer au support technique, essayons quelques solutions rapides: 1) Fermez complètement l'application et redémarrez-la, 2) Vérifiez que vous avez la dernière version installée, 3) Videz le cache de l'application dans les paramètres. Si le problème persiste, je peux créer un ticket de support technique prioritaire pour vous. Il serait utile de noter: la version de votre appareil, la version de l'application, et quand les plantages ont commencé. Notre équipe technique répond généralement dans les 2 heures.</s>

<s>[INST] Nataka kujua bei ya bidhaa zenu za premium. [/INST] Asante kwa nia yako katika bidhaa zetu za premium! Hizi hapa ni bei zetu za sasa: 1) Mpango wa Basic - KES 999/mwezi: huduma za msingi, 2) Mpango wa Premium - KES 2,499/mwezi: huduma zote na msaada wa kipaumbele, 3) Mpango wa Enterprise - KES 4,999/mwezi: huduma zote pamoja na meneja wa akaunti binafsi. Tunatoa pia bei maalum kwa malipo ya mwaka ambapo unapata punguzo la 20%. Je, ungependa kujua zaidi kuhusu mpango wowote?</s>

<s>[INST] I accidentally deleted important files from my cloud storage. Can you help recover them? [/INST] Don't worry, we can likely recover your deleted files! Deleted files are kept in our "Trash" folder for 30 days before permanent deletion. To recover them: 1) Go to your cloud storage dashboard, 2) Click on "Trash" or "Recently Deleted" in the left sidebar, 3) Select the files you want to restore, 4) Click "Restore." The files will be returned to their original location. If the files were deleted more than 30 days ago, please contact me with the approximate file names and deletion date, and our engineering team can attempt recovery from backups within 24-48 hours.</s>

<s>[INST] ¿Cómo puedo exportar mis datos de la plataforma? [/INST] Por supuesto, puedes exportar tus datos en cualquier momento. Sigue estos pasos: 1) Inicia sesión en tu cuenta, 2) Ve a "Configuración" > "Privacidad y datos", 3) Haz clic en "Exportar mis datos". Puedes elegir exportar en formato CSV o JSON. El proceso de exportación puede tardar entre 1 hora y 24 horas dependiendo de la cantidad de datos. Recibirás un correo electrónico con un enlace de descarga cuando esté listo. El enlace será válido durante 7 días. ¿Hay algún tipo de dato específico que necesites exportar?</s>

<s>[INST] I'm having trouble connecting my account to the mobile app. It keeps showing a timeout error. [/INST] I understand the frustration with the timeout error. Let's troubleshoot this step by step: 1) First, make sure you have a stable internet connection — try switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data, 2) Force-close the app and reopen it, 3) Check if you're using the latest version of the app from the App Store/Play Store, 4) Try logging in with your email instead of social login (or vice versa). If none of these work, try clearing the app's cache and data in your phone settings. This error can also occur during server maintenance — check our status page at status.example.com. If the issue continues, I can generate a one-time login token for you.</s>

<s>[INST] 请问你们的营业时间是什么时候？我需要电话咨询。 [/INST] 感谢您的咨询！我们的客服团队营业时间如下：周一至周五：上午9:00 - 下午6:00（东八区），周六：上午10:00 - 下午4:00，周日及法定节假日休息。电话咨询热线：400-XXX-XXXX。如果在非营业时间需要帮助，您可以：1) 通过在线聊天联系我们（24/7在线），2) 发送邮件至 support@example.com，我们会在下一个工作日回复，3) 查看我们的帮助中心获取常见问题解答。请问您需要咨询什么问题？我现在就可以帮您解答。</s>

<s>[INST] I want to add another user to my business account. How do I do that? [/INST] Great question! You can add team members to your business account with just a few steps: 1) Log into your admin dashboard, 2) Navigate to "Team Management" > "Add Member", 3) Enter their email address and select their role (Admin, Editor, or Viewer), 4) Click "Send Invitation." The new user will receive an email invitation to join your team. You can manage permissions at any time from the same page. Your current plan allows up to 10 team members. If you need more seats, you can upgrade your plan or purchase additional seats at $5/month per user. Would you like me to help you add someone right now?</s>

<s>[INST] Mon paiement a été refusé mais l'argent a été débité de mon compte. [/INST] Je comprends votre inquiétude et je m'excuse pour ce désagrément. Quand un paiement est refusé mais que l'argent apparaît débité, il s'agit généralement d'une autorisation temporaire (pré-autorisation) qui n'est pas un débit réel. Cette autorisation est automatiquement annulée et le montant est généralement restitué sous 3 à 5 jours ouvrables. Pour vérifier: 1) Consultez votre relevé bancaire — si c'est marqué comme "en attente", c'est une pré-autorisation, 2) Si après 5 jours ouvrables le montant n'est pas restitué, contactez-moi avec votre numéro de commande et je lancerai un remboursement manuel immédiatement.</s>

<s>[INST] Naweza kupata msaada kwa Kiswahili? [/INST] Ndio, bila shaka! Tunafurahi kukusaidia kwa Kiswahili. Timu yetu ya huduma kwa wateja inasaidia katika lugha nyingi ikiwa ni pamoja na Kiswahili, Kiingereza, Kifaransa, Kihispania, Kijerumani, Kichina, na Kiarabu. Unaweza kuwasiliana nasi kwa lugha yoyote unayopendelea kupitia: 1) Mazungumzo ya mtandaoni (sasa hivi), 2) Barua pepe: support@example.com, 3) Simu: +254-XXX-XXXXXX (Jumatatu-Ijumaa, 8AM-6PM EAT). Tafadhali niambie jinsi ninavyoweza kukusaidia leo?</s>

<s>[INST] Ich habe eine verdächtige E-Mail erhalten, die vorgibt, von eurem Unternehmen zu sein. [/INST] Vielen Dank, dass Sie uns darüber informieren! Die Sicherheit unserer Kunden ist uns sehr wichtig. Bitte beachten Sie Folgendes: 1) Klicken Sie NICHT auf Links in der verdächtigen E-Mail, 2) Öffnen Sie KEINE Anhänge, 3) Leiten Sie die E-Mail an security@example.com weiter, damit wir sie untersuchen können. Unsere offiziellen E-Mails kommen ausschließlich von @example.com-Adressen. Wir fragen niemals per E-Mail nach Passwörtern oder Kreditkartendaten. Wenn Sie auf einen Link geklickt haben, ändern Sie bitte sofort Ihr Passwort und aktivieren Sie die Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung in Ihren Kontoeinstellungen.</s>

<s>[INST] How do I enable two-factor authentication on my account? [/INST] Great choice for securing your account! Here's how to enable two-factor authentication (2FA): 1) Log into your account and go to "Settings" > "Security", 2) Click "Enable Two-Factor Authentication", 3) Choose your preferred method: a) Authenticator App (recommended) — scan the QR code with Google Authenticator or Authy, b) SMS — receive codes via text message, c) Email — receive codes via email, 4) Enter the verification code to confirm setup, 5) Save the backup recovery codes in a secure location. Once enabled, you'll need to enter a verification code each time you log in from a new device. This significantly reduces the risk of unauthorized access.</s>

<s>[INST] Quiero reportar un problema con la calidad del producto que recibí. [/INST] Lamento mucho escuchar que el producto no cumplió con sus expectativas de calidad. Nos tomamos estos reportes muy en serio. Para ayudarle de la mejor manera: 1) Por favor describa el problema de calidad específico, 2) Si es posible, tome fotos del producto mostrando el defecto, 3) Comparta su número de pedido. Una vez que revise la información, puedo ofrecerle: un reemplazo gratuito enviado con prioridad, un reembolso completo, o un crédito en su cuenta con un 15% adicional por las molestias. También reportaré el problema a nuestro equipo de control de calidad para evitar que se repita. ¿Cuál opción prefiere?</s>

<s>[INST] I'd like to know about your data privacy policy. How is my information protected? [/INST] Thank you for caring about your data privacy — it's important to us too. Here's a summary of our data protection practices: 1) **Encryption**: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256), 2) **Data Storage**: Your data is stored in ISO 27001 certified data centers, 3) **Access Control**: We use strict role-based access — only authorized personnel can access user data, 4) **Data Retention**: We retain your data only as long as your account is active plus 30 days after deletion, 5) **Third Parties**: We never sell your data to third parties, 6) **Compliance**: We comply with GDPR, CCPA, and POPIA regulations. You can view our full privacy policy at example.com/privacy, download your data at any time, or request complete data deletion. Would you like more details on any specific aspect?</s>

<s>[INST] 我的账户被锁定了，无法登录。请帮我解锁。 [/INST] 我理解被锁定账户的不便，让我帮您解决这个问题。账户被锁定通常是由于多次输入错误密码触发了安全保护。为了验证您的身份并解锁账户，请提供以下信息：1) 您的注册邮箱地址，2) 账户注册时使用的姓名，3) 最近一次成功登录的大概时间。验证通过后，我将立即为您解锁账户并发送密码重置链接到您的邮箱。为了安全起见，建议您解锁后：1) 更改密码，2) 开启双重认证，3) 检查账户活动记录确保没有异常。</s>

<s>[INST] Je n'arrive pas à télécharger ma facture. Le bouton ne fonctionne pas. [/INST] Je suis désolé pour ce problème technique. Essayons de résoudre cela ensemble. Plusieurs solutions possibles: 1) Essayez un autre navigateur (Chrome, Firefox, Safari), 2) Désactivez temporairement votre bloqueur de publicités qui peut interférer avec le téléchargement, 3) Videz le cache de votre navigateur et réessayez, 4) Essayez de faire un clic droit sur le bouton et sélectionnez "Enregistrer le lien sous...". Si aucune de ces solutions ne fonctionne, je peux vous envoyer la facture directement par e-mail au format PDF. Voulez-vous que je vous l'envoie? Quel est le numéro de facture ou la période de facturation concernée?</s>

<s>[INST] I'm interested in your enterprise plan. Can someone from sales contact me? [/INST] Absolutely! I'd be happy to connect you with our enterprise sales team. Our Enterprise plan includes: dedicated account manager, custom SLA with 99.99% uptime guarantee, advanced security features (SSO, SCIM provisioning), unlimited API access, custom integrations, priority 24/7 phone support, and volume-based pricing. To get started, I'll need a few details: 1) Your name and company name, 2) Your preferred email and phone number, 3) Approximate team size, 4) Any specific requirements or use cases. A member of our enterprise team will reach out within 1 business day with a customized proposal. We also offer a free 30-day enterprise trial. Would you like me to set that up?</s>

<s>[INST] Bidhaa niliyoagiza si ile niliyochagua. Nilituma oda ya simu lakini nimepokea kipaza sauti. [/INST] Pole sana kwa kosa hili! Naelewa jinsi inavyosumbua kupokea bidhaa tofauti na uliyoagiza. Tutashughulikia hili haraka iwezekanavyo. Tafadhali: 1) Tupe nambari ya oda yako, 2) Chukua picha ya bidhaa uliyopokea, 3) Usifungue au kutumia bidhaa hiyo. Tutakutumia bidhaa sahihi ndani ya siku 2-3 za kazi bila malipo ya ziada ya usafirishaji. Pia, tutapanga kukushu bidhaa isiyo sahihi kutoka kwako bila gharama yoyote. Kama fidia ya usumbufu, tutakuongezea punguzo la 15% kwenye oda yako inayofuata. Je, hii inakubalika kwako?</s>

<s>[INST] How can I integrate your API with my existing system? [/INST] Great question! Our API integration is straightforward. Here's how to get started: 1) **Get API Keys**: Go to "Settings" > "Developer" > "API Keys" to generate your credentials, 2) **Documentation**: Full API docs are at docs.example.com/api — includes endpoints, authentication, rate limits, and code examples in Python, JavaScript, Java, and Go, 3) **Authentication**: We use OAuth 2.0 with Bearer tokens, 4) **Rate Limits**: Free tier: 100 requests/min, Premium: 1000/min, Enterprise: custom. Quick start example: ```Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY``` — then make requests to api.example.com/v2/. We also offer SDKs for popular languages and pre-built integrations for Salesforce, Zapier, and Slack. Would you like me to connect you with our developer relations team for a guided setup?</s>
